# SoberHelpline - AI Context File

> Education, support, and ethical resources for families navigating a loved one's addiction.

## About SoberHelpline

SoberHelpline is a comprehensive family support platform for addiction education, community, and resource navigation. Founded by Matt Brown, a professional interventionist with over 20 years of experience, SoberHelpline provides families with the education, tools, and connections they need — without the sales pressure, referral fees, or patient brokering that plague the treatment industry.

## Core Philosophy

- Addiction is a chronic medical illness with a spiritual solution (purpose, connection, growth — not religious)
- Families need education BEFORE crisis, not just during it
- The family's recovery is just as important as the addicted person's
- Treatment resources should be vetted and ethical — no referral fees, no kickbacks
- Enabling is the oxygen for the fire of addiction
- Boundaries aren't boundaries without consequences attached

## Key Features

### Recovery Roadmap (NEW)
A free, interactive, stage-based family recovery navigator. Families take a 5-minute assessment, get placed in one of 8 stages, and receive a personalized step-by-step action plan.

**8 Stages:**
1. 🔴 Suspicion — "Something is off but I'm not sure"
2. 🟠 Confirmation — "I know they're using, I don't know what to do"
3. 🟡 Crisis — "Things are falling apart right now"
4. 🔵 Pre-Intervention — "I'm ready to do something but need help"
5. 🟣 Treatment — "They're in treatment, now what?"
6. 🟢 Early Recovery — "They're home, how do we do this?"
7. ⚪ Long-Term Recovery — "It's been 6+ months, how do we rebuild?"
8. 🔴 Relapse — "It happened again"

URL: https://soberhelpline.com/roadmap

### AI Coaching Tools
- AI Life Coach: https://soberhelpline.com/ai-life-coach
- AI Enabling Decision Coach: https://soberhelpline.com/ai-enabling-decision-coach
- AI Boundary Builder Coach: https://soberhelpline.com/ai-boundary-builder-coach
- AI Treatment Navigator: https://soberhelpline.com/ai-treatment-navigator
- AI Relapse Response Guide: https://soberhelpline.com/ai-relapse-response-guide
- AI Addiction Reality Translator: https://soberhelpline.com/ai-addiction-reality-translator

### Provider Directory
Vetted treatment providers — no referral fees, no kickbacks, no patient brokering. Categories include:
- Inpatient Treatment: https://soberhelpline.com/inpatient-treatment
- Outpatient Treatment: https://soberhelpline.com/outpatient-treatment
- Medical Detox: https://soberhelpline.com/medical-detox
- Sober Living: https://soberhelpline.com/sober-living
- Therapists: https://soberhelpline.com/therapists
- Psychiatrists: https://soberhelpline.com/psychiatrists
- Interventionists: https://soberhelpline.com/interventionists
- Sober Coaches: https://soberhelpline.com/sober-coaches-companions

### Family Education Library
65+ blog articles and educational pages covering addiction, family dynamics, boundaries, treatment navigation, mental health, and recovery.
URL: https://soberhelpline.com/blog

### Weekly Family Support Group
Free weekly Zoom support group for families — Mondays at 7 PM Pacific.
URL: https://soberhelpline.com/monday-zoom-registration

### Family Addiction Answers
Answer-engine summary page that routes families to the right support level: free Family Squares support, private coaching when they cannot wait, or intervention readiness when safety risk, treatment refusal, or repeated relapse is escalating.
URL: https://soberhelpline.com/family-addiction-answers

### Family Coaching
One-on-one coaching with Matt Brown for families navigating addiction.
URL: https://soberhelpline.com/family-coaching

## Contact

- Phone: (458) 202-7900

- Website: https://soberhelpline.com

## Related Properties

- **The Party Wreckers Podcast** — Addiction and recovery conversations: https://partywreckers.com
- **No More Enabling** — Education on enabling behaviors: https://nomoreenabling.com

## Pages

- [Home](/): Family addiction support, education, and ethical resources.
- [Start Here](/start-here): Choose the right next step for your family.
- [Recovery Roadmap](/roadmap): Free 5-minute assessment placing families in 1 of 8 stages.
- [Family Addiction Answers](/family-addiction-answers): Answer-engine summary routing families to the right support level.
- [Family Squares](/family-squares): Free Monday 7 PM Pacific Zoom support meeting.
- [Monday Zoom Registration](/monday-zoom-registration): Register for the weekly family support Zoom.
- [Family Membership](/family-membership): Structured ongoing family addiction support.
- [Family Support](/family-support): Free family addiction support resources and education.
- [Family Coaching](/family-coaching): Private one-on-one family coaching with Matt Brown.
- [Family Consultation](/family-consultation): Book a private consultation about your family's situation.
- [Family Readiness Intensive](/family-readiness-intensive): Focused intervention readiness strategy session.
- [Intervention Help](/intervention-help): Warning signs and next steps for professional intervention.
- [Interventionists](/interventionists): Find a vetted professional interventionist.
- [Family Education](/family-education): Member education library — Six Pillars curriculum.
- [Blog](/blog): 65+ articles on addiction, family dynamics, boundaries, and recovery.
- [FAQs](/faqs): Frequently asked questions about family addiction support.
- [Testimonials](/testimonials): Family member reviews and feedback.

## Provider Directory

- [Inpatient Treatment](/inpatient-treatment): Vetted inpatient rehab facilities.
- [Outpatient Treatment](/outpatient-treatment): Outpatient treatment programs.
- [Medical Detox](/medical-detox): Medically supervised detox providers.
- [Sober Living](/sober-living): Sober living homes and recovery housing.
- [Therapists](/therapists): Addiction-aware therapists.
- [Psychiatrists](/psychiatrists): Addiction psychiatry providers.
- [Sober Coaches & Companions](/sober-coaches-companions): Recovery coaches and sober companions.
- [Recovery Resources](/recovery-resources): Browse all provider categories.

## AI Coaching Tools

- [AI Life Coach](/ai-life-coach): On-demand life coaching for family members.
- [AI Enabling Decision Coach](/ai-enabling-decision-coach): Decide whether an action is enabling.
- [AI Boundary Builder Coach](/ai-boundary-builder-coach): Build boundaries with consequences.
- [AI Treatment Navigator](/ai-treatment-navigator): Navigate treatment options.
- [AI Relapse Response Guide](/ai-relapse-response-guide): Respond to relapse situations.
- [AI Addiction Reality Translator](/ai-addiction-reality-translator): Translate addiction behavior into reality.
